meaning: vt.鍔濆憡,蹇犲憡,璀﹀憡,寤鸿
examples: I'd advise you not to tell him.
I'd advise you against doing that.
Urban planners advise that cities with populations of more than 2 million should have mass transit systems.
Advise senior management on trends and developments in Education Outcomes, and recommend appropriate course of action.
